prompt: A top-down isometric fantasy RPG gameplay screenshot set in a rustic medieval market street, with a strong tilt-shift depth-of-field effect that makes the scene look miniature. In the foreground, a tiny chibi-style anime girl adventurer stands facing a merchant stall; she has medium brown hair in twin ponytails with blue ribbon ornaments, very large round eyes, a blue pacifier in her mouth, and a detailed blue-and-white dress with lace trim, puff sleeves, white stockings, dark shoes, and a small brown pouch at her waist. She is positioned slightly left of center, looking up at a male shopkeeper leaning over a long wooden counter covered with a muted green cloth. The shopkeeper wears a white lace-up shirt with rolled sleeves and a brown vest, but his face is unnaturally blurred, smeared, or featureless like a rendering bug. The stall is dense with props: 2 wicker baskets of produce, 2 cloth sacks, 1 loaf of bread on the counter, 1 folded map or paper, 1 small framed chalkboard sign, 2 ceramic bottles or jars in reddish tones, stacked wooden crates, wooden beams, and a round hanging shop sign with a cup emblem. In the background, 1 blurry woman in a long dress walks along the cobblestone street, and a horse-drawn cart or wagon shape is visible in soft focus on the left. The lighting is warm afternoon sunlight with dappled shadows across the stone pavement and stall. Include a full game UI overlay: top-left Japanese quest text reading "各地を冒険し、情報を集めよう", bottom-left circular minimap with 2 small adjacent icons, bottom-center status bar showing "Lv.12" and "1286/1286" with a green HP bar, center-right interaction prompt with a speech bubble icon and the Japanese text "話す" plus an "A" button icon, and bottom-right 4 circular action buttons including 1 large blue sword attack button and 3 smaller skill buttons around it. The overall feeling should be a high-detail JRPG town scene, cozy and painterly, but with one eerie glitched face that makes the image resemble a ghostly bugged screenshot.
